Rhodes tourist evidence pass 2026-06-01: World Beach Guide plus OSM support Sousounia beach identity/location on Rhodes and basic beach traceability. Kept medium because access, services and detailed terrain coverage remain too thin for high. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.

Rhodes continuation 2026-06-02: World Beach Guide supports Sousounia Beach identity on Rhodes and pebble terrain, RhodesOldTown lists Sousounia in the south-west coast beach set, and OSM supports location traceability. Promoted static metadata confidence to high, removed the unverified rocks terrain detail, and kept access as unknown because no direct source confirms road/path difficulty. No windProfile, scoring, coordinates, photos, or live condition claims were changed.
